seed_text: The world is emblematic. Parts of speech are metaphors, because the whole of nature is a metaphor of the human mind
thematic_frame: Ralph Waldo Emerson — Over-Soul, Self-Reliance, Transcendentalism

*   a little breeze, then nothing.
